labacts.name: Division Algorithm
labacts.description: Computes quotient and remainder for two positive integers using the division algorithm.

labacts.name: Euclidean
labacts.description: Finds GCD and LCM of two positive integers using the Euclidean algorithm.

labacts.name: Collatz Sequence
labacts.description: Generates the Collatz sequence from a positive odd integer until it reaches 1.

labacts.name: Fibonacci
labacts.description: Displays the Fibonacci sequence up to n terms where n is greater than 2.

labacts.name: Lucas
labacts.description: Displays the Lucas sequence up to n terms where n is greater than 2.

labacts.name: Tribonacci
labacts.description: Displays the Tribonacci sequence up to n terms where n is greater than 3.

labacts.name: Palindrome
labacts.description: Checks whether a string is a palindrome, counting symbols, numbers, and spaces.

inputs.label: Enter a string:
inputs.placeholder: e.g. A man, a plan, a canal
